name: Smoked Old Fashioned
preparation: Smoke a rocks glass with applewood chips. Place a small pile of applewood chips on a heat-safe surface or in a smoking device, ignite them with a kitchen torch until they smolder, then capture the smoke by inverting the glass over the chips for 30–60 seconds. Alternatively, use a handheld cocktail smoker clipped to the glass.
Add bourbon, syrup and bitters with a large ice cube and stir.
